text.message: It eas either that or 6 11 12, all that's left
So I guess I had to take one of your spots anyways
U really think someone is gonna give u 2 cards on your turn
Green I don't get why would you do that, it was quite unnecessary for you and it just destroys my wheatless game
Its my only way to have ore
You started the game table talking against me lol
Its actually quite necessary for me
this game is a two person race between blue and green id say
It was an honest reaction couse i thougth blue was going for u for taking the spot
Ah I get it, you wanted to make me a target
Guess it didn't work out but at least you got a good spot and a bunch of blocks
why if in my opinion he is not in the best spot?
Cool, I can give brick tbh
i dont need the 5 to be open for now
I'm at 3 and no city, not giving 2 cards
Red u can start blocking blue as well now
I have rolled one 7 this game lol stop crying
And you keep blocking me so
U saying stop crying? When u were craying couse i went for ore
Yeah I say stop crying because you were just crying
